name: Multi-agent office
desc: Each agent session gets a desk; overflow agents auto-fill new floors

name: Multi-floor office
desc: PageUp/PageDown/↑↓/jk to navigate floors with slide transition

name: Floating desktop window
desc: `pixtuoid floating` opens a frameless, always-on-top desktop window of the office — not just a terminal TUI

name: OpenClaw gateway mascot
desc: A live OpenClaw gateway shows up as a wandering lobster whose motion tracks gateway health

name: Vibing
desc: A sun and moon arc the skyline as the day turns, weather rolls past the windows (rain, storm, snow, fog, overcast, windy, smog), and six themes reskin the office

name: Office pets
desc: A cat or dog (one per floor) roams desks, pantry, sofas; sleeps near idle agents. Click to pet — pixel-art hearts float up

name: Agent tree dashboard
desc: Tab opens a foldable tree of every floor's agents — badged by CLI, with activity tints and tool-call counts

name: Office spaces
desc: Cubicles, a meeting lounge, and a pantry — the office is laid out in distinct furnished zones, not just a grid of identical desks

name: Animated characters
desc: Typing, waiting (`?`), sleeping (z's), walking with A\*-routed pathfinding

card.blurb: everyone types, waits with a '?', naps under z's, and walks A*-routed paths between desks.

name: Coffee run
desc: Idle agents visit the pantry, carry a cup back to their desk. Cup stays while you work; taken on exit

card.blurb: idle agents fetch a coffee from the pantry and carry it back — the cup stays till they leave.

name: Pantry chitchat
desc: 2+ idle agents at the same waypoint trigger speech bubbles with dev-humor snippets

name: Team palette
desc: Shirt + pants colored by working directory (same repo → same color, a glanceable org-chart); hair/skin per agent. 16 curated outfits

card.blurb: shirt and pants colored by working directory — same repo, same colors: the room reads like an org-chart.

name: Per-tool monitor glow
desc: Edit = blue, Bash = orange, Read = cyan — scannable at a glance

card.blurb: edit glows blue, bash orange, read cyan — you can read the room from across the floor.

name: Hover tooltips
desc: Hover an agent for session duration, tool-call count and active-time %; hover any furniture — desks, sofas, plants, vending machine, printer — for its name

card.blurb: hover a coworker for session length, tool-call count and active-time %, or any desk or plant for its name.

name: Hook-safe
desc: The shim always exits 0 — a stuck visualizer can never block your agent

card.blurb: the hook shim always exits 0 — a stuck office can never block the agent it's watching.
